title: achillea lanulosa subsp. megacephala
intro: Achillea lanulosa subsp. megacephala, also known as Yarrow or Western Yarrow, is a plant species in the daisy family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in reducing inflammation and promoting healing in wounds, thanks to its antiseptic and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Achillea lanulosa subsp. megacephala include relieving menstrual cramps, reducing fever, and soothing digestive issues, as well as its ability to act as a natural insect repellent. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
